critical_code_review_comments: CrispChat.jsx: Correctly checks for CRISP_ID before loading SDK, returns null when empty
CrispChat.jsx: Properly identifies logged-in users with email, name, company_id, role, plan
CrispChat.jsx: Uses useEffect with proper dependency array for SDK loading and user identification
App.js: CrispChat rendered inside AuthProvider/SubscriptionProvider tree for access to user context
LandingPage.jsx: Banner text correctly updated to 'Tarif garanti jusqu'à l'homologation e-CMR'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 20 verified: 1) Banner text changed from '47 places' to 'Tarif garanti jusqu'à l'homologation e-CMR'. 2) CrispChat.jsx component added - loads Crisp SDK only when REACT_APP_CRISP_WEBSITE_ID is set (currently empty). When ID is provided, it auto-identifies logged-in users with email, name, company_id, role, plan. Widget will appear on all pages once real CRISP_ID is configured. All dashboards working. Console shows Firestore permission errors but app functions correctly.

mocked_apis.note: Crisp widget not visible because REACT_APP_CRISP_WEBSITE_ID is empty - this is expected behavior
